# Convergent Methods

> AI-native developer tools. Open-source. MIT licensed.

Convergent Methods builds tools that give AI agents structured access to enterprise data infrastructure. Our flagship product is Boyce.

## Products

- [Boyce](https://convergentmethods.com/boyce/): Semantic protocol and safety layer for agentic database workflows. Deterministic SQL compiler, NULL trap detection, EXPLAIN pre-flight validation.
- [Boyce llms.txt](https://convergentmethods.com/boyce/llms.txt): Agent-optimized documentation for Boyce
- [Boyce Full Docs](https://convergentmethods.com/boyce/llms-full.txt): Complete agent-readable reference

## Resources

- [The Null Trap](https://convergentmethods.com/boyce/null-trap/): Why NULL distributions silently corrupt agentic SQL — and why the fix isn't a better model

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ConvergentMethods)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/boyce/)
